author: Vincent Gruner
title: Officii missae sacrique canonis expositio
editions: Hain- Copinger *2387, pt. 2, vol. 1, p. 237; Reichling, fasc. 2, p. 167).
remarks: May not be a proper expositio, since the Mass section only deals with special questions. [Inc: Venerabiles fratres et domini]. Actually an abbreviated version of Nicholas Stoer. See https://www.lux-et-umbra.com/descriptions/stor.php;
